column2: Case 3 — Add Dexterous Arm to Functional Test

Adds a Dexterous Robotic Arm to handle Functional Test — the precision station where the Stationary Assembler (25 ticks) exceeds the 18-tick target and the Arm (14 ticks) does not. The assignment rule automatically routes the Arm to that station. The Assembler handles Final Assembly and Pack & Label; the Arm handles Functional Test. Compare Part Cycle Time and throughput against Case 2.
